raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un kas wehl no Joafa Lee-
tahm atteek/ ko wiꞥſch darrijs
irr/ un winna Spehks/ un ka
wiꞥſch ar Amaziju to Kehnizu
no Juhda karrojis/ tas irr rak-
stihts to Israëta Kehnizu Laiku-
Grahmata.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Joas aiswigge ar ta-
weem Tehweem/ un tappe eekſch
Samarijas pee teem Israëta
Kehnineen aprakts/ un Jerobe-
ams winna Dehls tappe par
Kehnizu winna Weeta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet Amazijus Joafa ta
Kehniza no Juhda Dehls dsh-
woja/ kad Joas Joaifa ta Isra-
eëta Kehniza Dehls bija nomir-
ris/ perzpadesmits Gaddus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un kas wehl no Amazi-
jus Leetahm atteek/ tas irr rak-
stihts to Kehnizu no Juhda Laiku-Grahmata.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tee darrija weenu Der-
ribu prett winnu Jerusaleme.
Bet wiꞥſch behdse us Lakisu/ bet
tee fuhttija winnam pakkat ns La-
kisu/ un nokawe winnu tor.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tee atwedde winnu us
Sirgeem/ un wiꞥſch tappe Je-
rusaleme aprakts pee jaweem
Tehweem Dabwida Vilsh.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiſſi Landis no Juh-
da nehme Asariju/ tas pats bja
feſchpadesmits Gaddus wezz/ un
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tas ustaifija Elatu/ un
atdabbuja to attat pee Juhda/
pehz to kad tas Kehnixſch ar ja-
weem Tehweem btja aismidſis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Peektâpadesmita Gaddâ
Amazijus Joafa Dehla/ ta Keh-
nixa no Juhda/ tappē Jerobeams
Joafa Dehls par Kehnizu pahr
Israëlu eekſch Samarijas/ (un
waldiſa) tschetrdesmits un wee-
nu Gaddu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſch darrija/ kas
tam KUNGAM ne patikke/
wiꞥſch ne atstahjehs no wiﬀeem
Grebkeim Jerobeama Neebata
Dehla/ kas Israëlu grehkoht
darrijs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tas atdabbuja to Israë-
ta Rohbeschu/ no tahs Weetas/
kur us Eematu eet/ lihds to Klai-
juma Juhru/ pehz ta KUNGA
ta Israëta Deewa Wahrdw/ ko
wiꞥſch bij runnajs zaur jawu
Kalpu to Praweetu Jonatu A-
mitaja Dehlu/ tas no Gat-Ge-
wera bija.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo tas KUNGS uslub-
koja/ ka Israëta Behdas fohti
rubktas bija/ ta arri ne neeka
wairs mistlehgts nedg pamests
vija/ un ku Israetam Palga
ne btja.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas KUNGS ne bij
runnajs/ ka tas Israëta Wahrdn
appakſch Debbeim gribohts is-
deldeht/ bet wiꞥſch atpestija tohs
zaur Jerobeaina Joafa Dehta
Rohku.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
